settings.title: Vault Configuration

personal.title: Personal Identity
personal.photo_desc: Upload a portrait for your official heritage record. Photos are processed and stored securely in an encrypted AWS S3 bucket.

hero.title: Our Legacy, Properly Preserved.
hero.subtitle: A high-security heritage hub for multigenerational records, legal documents, and family kinship tracking.

milestones.title: Vault Milestones
milestones.empty_desc: The heritage vault is synchronized. Check back soon for upcoming family celebrations.

security.desc: All directory metadata is redundantly stored across high-availability PostgreSQL clusters.

members.title: Our Living Legacy
members.subtitle: A complete digital record of our family connections, preserving our history and current generation for those yet to come.

form.subtitle: Synchronizing heritage metadata with encrypted vault.

auth.enterprise_grade: Enterprise-grade digital vault for ancestral preservation and family legacy management.
auth.subtitle_login: Enter your credentials to access the family's digital heritage vault.
auth.subtitle_register: Create a secure identity to begin preserving your family's legacy.

tree.title: Heritage Lineage
tree.subtitle: A visual representation of our roots and branches, tracing the connections that bind us through generations.

calendar.title: The Heritage Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Synchronizing family milestones and remembrance dates.
calendar.no_records: No milestones recorded for this date.

announcements.title: Heritage Dispatches
announcements.subtitle: Official proclamations and updates from the family curator and senior members.
announcements.no_dispatches_desc: The dispatch ledger is currently quiet. Check back later for official family updates.

modal.title: Heritage Broadcast
modal.subtitle: Disseminate important information to all members across the digital hub.
modal.placeholder_content: Enter the full details of your dispatch here...

memorials.title: The Book of Memories
memorials.subtitle: Honoring the life and enduring impact of our ancestors and loved ones who rest in history.
memorials.remembrance_desc: Special dates coming up for our honored ancestors.
memorials.archive_desc: Browse heritage documents and shared memories of the departed.

archives.title: The Family Archives
archives.subtitle: A curated repository of historical documents, ancestral photos, and legal records preserved for eternity.
archives.search: Search archives by title or member...
archives.no_records_desc: The archives are currently empty. Use the 'Store Record' button to begin preservation.

sidebar.encrypted_desc: All documents are stored with AES-256 encryption at rest in our secure S3 bucket.

modal.title: Secure Archival
modal.subtitle: Add a new record to the heritage vault. All data is redundantly stored across high-availability clusters.
